title: Assemble and prepare competition vehicles for motor sport events
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assemble and prepare competition vehicles for motor sport events demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect event category information and analyse assembly requirements

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from event category information and workplace instructions1.2 Check vehicle operating conditions and seek clarification of specifications as required1.3 Source and interpret methods for assembly and preparation and select those required for the circumstances 1.4 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required1.5 Prepare component requirements list and communicate to required persons1.6 Determine procedures for minimising waste material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from event category information and workplace instructions1.2 Check vehicle operating conditions and seek clarification of specifications as required1.3 Source and interpret methods for assembly and preparation and select those required for the circumstances 1.4 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required1.5 Prepare component requirements list and communicate to required persons1.6 Determine procedures for minimising waste material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from event category information and workplace instructions1.2 Check vehicle operating conditions and seek clarification of specifications as required1.3 Source and interpret methods for assembly and preparation and select those required for the circumstances 1.4 Propose modifications or adaptation of equipment as required1.5 Prepare component requirements list and communicate to required persons1.6 Determine procedures for minimising waste material.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect event category information and analyse assembly requirements

elements.title: Prepare work area and equipment

pcs.text: Source and check tools and equipment for safe and effective operation 2.2 Clean and lay out work area for job requirements according to work safety requirements and team procedures2.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks2.4 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and check tools and equipment for safe and effective operation 2.2 Clean and lay out work area for job requirements according to work safety requirements and team procedures2.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks2.4 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and check tools and equipment for safe and effective operation 2.2 Clean and lay out work area for job requirements according to work safety requirements and team procedures2.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks2.4 Report problems with work area or operation of equipment to persons according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare work area and equipment

elements.title: Prepare components for assembly

pcs.text: Source and interpret assembly procedures and information3.2 Clean components to facilitate pre-assembly inspection according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components3.3 Inspect components for function and quality to ensure optimum use of resources3.4 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret assembly procedures and information3.2 Clean components to facilitate pre-assembly inspection according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components3.3 Inspect components for function and quality to ensure optimum use of resources3.4 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret assembly procedures and information3.2 Clean components to facilitate pre-assembly inspection according to team procedures and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components3.3 Inspect components for function and quality to ensure optimum use of resources3.4 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare components for assembly

elements.title: Install sub-assemblies

pcs.text: Inspect sub-assemblies for quality and readiness for installation according to manufacturer specifications4.2 Install sub-assemblies and tension fasteners according to safety requirements and manufacturer installation sequences and techniques4.3 Make checks to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications4.4 Report problems with sub-assemblies to persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect sub-assemblies for quality and readiness for installation according to manufacturer specifications4.2 Install sub-assemblies and tension fasteners according to safety requirements and manufacturer installation sequences and techniques4.3 Make checks to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications4.4 Report problems with sub-assemblies to persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect sub-assemblies for quality and readiness for installation according to manufacturer specifications4.2 Install sub-assemblies and tension fasteners according to safety requirements and manufacturer installation sequences and techniques4.3 Make checks to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications4.4 Report problems with sub-assemblies to persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Install sub-assemblies

elements.title: Install ancillary systems

pcs.text: Locate critical components according to function, susceptibility to damage, and ease of maintenance5.2 Install critical components and tension fasteners according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.3 Confirm optimum layout for wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components5.4 Install wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components and tension fasteners according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.5 Secure entire installation and shield to maximise reliability and minimise susceptibility to damage according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.6 Make checks during and after installation to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.7 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate critical components according to function, susceptibility to damage, and ease of maintenance5.2 Install critical components and tension fasteners according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.3 Confirm optimum layout for wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components5.4 Install wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components and tension fasteners according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.5 Secure entire installation and shield to maximise reliability and minimise susceptibility to damage according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.6 Make checks during and after installation to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.7 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate critical components according to function, susceptibility to damage, and ease of maintenance5.2 Install critical components and tension fasteners according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.3 Confirm optimum layout for wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components5.4 Install wiring loom, connectors, hoses, hard lines and ancillary components and tension fasteners according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.5 Secure entire installation and shield to maximise reliability and minimise susceptibility to damage according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements5.6 Make checks during and after installation to ensure accurate and complete fitting according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications5.7 Report problems with components to persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Install ancillary systems

elements.title: Conduct post-assembly checks

pcs.text: Check and top up vehicle fluid levels as required according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications6.2 Remove temporary bungs and covers and conduct engine pre-start checks 6.3 Check sub-assemblies and ancillary systems for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and top up vehicle fluid levels as required according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications6.2 Remove temporary bungs and covers and conduct engine pre-start checks 6.3 Check sub-assemblies and ancillary systems for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and top up vehicle fluid levels as required according to team procedures and manufacturer specifications6.2 Remove temporary bungs and covers and conduct engine pre-start checks 6.3 Check sub-assemblies and ancillary systems for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Conduct post-assembly checks

elements.title: Set vehicle baseline configuration

pcs.text: Determine vehicle baseline settings from team instructions, category regulations, and component supplier specifications 7.2 Establish level surface on which to place vehicle for set-up7.3 Install springs and dampers according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.4 Measure and adjust ride height and corner weight as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.5 Measure and adjust steering angles as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.6 Report potential or existing problems to persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine vehicle baseline settings from team instructions, category regulations, and component supplier specifications 7.2 Establish level surface on which to place vehicle for set-up7.3 Install springs and dampers according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.4 Measure and adjust ride height and corner weight as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.5 Measure and adjust steering angles as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.6 Report potential or existing problems to persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine vehicle baseline settings from team instructions, category regulations, and component supplier specifications 7.2 Establish level surface on which to place vehicle for set-up7.3 Install springs and dampers according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.4 Measure and adjust ride height and corner weight as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.5 Measure and adjust steering angles as required and according to manufacturer specifications, team procedures and safety requirements7.6 Report potential or existing problems to persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Set vehicle baseline configuration

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 8.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures8.3 Check and store tools and equipment, and pack and store surplus components and consumables according to workplace procedures8.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 8.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures8.3 Check and store tools and equipment, and pack and store surplus components and consumables according to workplace procedures8.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 8.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures8.3 Check and store tools and equipment, and pack and store surplus components and consumables according to workplace procedures8.4 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E8: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
